servicesOverview.title: What Do We Do?
servicesOverview.description: TSR GROUP is a management and investment company in the residential sector. We transform real estate into an asset: we handle the entire process from selection and purchase to rental, operation, and additional services.
servicesOverview.ecosystem: We create an ecosystem where every participant benefits:
servicesOverview.notAnAgency: TSR GROUP is not an agency or a private real estate agency. It is a systematic structure carried out with automation, reporting, service, and quality control at all stages.
servicesOverview.trustedBecause: We are trusted because our real estate really works.

companyAbout.title: About the Company
companyAbout.p1: Uğur Taşar is a visionary leader and professional who has proven himself in Turkey's real estate and construction sectors. A graduate of Pamukkale University Faculty of Information Technologies, Taşar makes a difference in the sector with a perspective that brings technology and construction together.
companyAbout.p2: As TSR GROUP, we set out with the dream of providing international standards of service to our guests coming to Alanya. With our years of experience and customer-oriented approach, we have attained a leading position in the sector. In every project, we prioritize quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Contact us for your questions, we are happy to help you
contactPage.contactInfoDesc: We are here to provide you with the best service. You can contact us for your questions, suggestions or requests.
contactPage.addressText:
Ersel apt, Şekerhane, Ali İmam Sk. 18/A
07400 Alanya/Antalya
contactPage.formDesc: Fill out the form, we will get back to you as soon as possible
contactPage.successDesc: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

corporatePage.journeyDesc: As TSR GROUP, we set out with the dream of providing international standards of service to our guests coming to Alanya. With our years of experience and customer-oriented approach, we have attained a leading position in the sector. In every project, we prioritize quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction.
corporatePage.visionDesc: As one of the leading companies in the Turkish real estate sector, we aim to raise industry standards with innovative projects. Our main vision is to maintain and develop our leadership position in the sector with sustainable growth, quality service, and customer satisfaction.

trust.title: Trust and Transparency
trust.desc: Transparency and reliability are our most important values in our relationships with our customers. We establish open and honest communication in all our transactions.

quality.title: Quality and Comfort
quality.desc: We adopt the highest quality standards in our services and strive to provide maximum comfort to our customers.

customer.title: Customer Orientation
customer.desc: Customer satisfaction is our priority. We strive to understand the needs of each of our customers and offer the best solutions.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.desc: With our experience in the sector and our professional approach, we offer our customers reliable and high-quality service.

one.title: Our Principles
one.desc: This principle nurtures the habit of working more efficiently and the understanding of actively analyzing the market. It forms the basis of stable growth and sustainable success in all TSR Group projects.

two.title: Safety Oriented Approach
two.desc: Structures designed based on high durability, long life, and full compliance with earthquake regulations prioritize the safety not only of the projects but also of the people living in them and the entire city.

three.title: Contribution to the Future
three.desc: Thanks to years of experience and close follow-up of current technologies, unique projects offering high quality of life are implemented.

corporatePage.approachDesc: Thanks to an effective control and inspection system, construction processes are meticulously followed at every stage. This approach guarantees that projects are completed in accordance with the highest quality standards, on time, and completely.
corporatePage.founderDesc: Uğur Taşar is a visionary leader and professional who has proven himself in Turkey's real estate and construction sectors. A graduate of Pamukkale University Faculty of Information Technologies, Taşar makes a difference in the sector with a perspective that brings technology and construction together.

2014.title: Entry into the Sector
2014.desc: Stepped into the construction and real estate sector and laid the foundations of TSR Group.

2015.title: Growth and Development
2015.desc: In this period, where active contribution was made to the Turkish economy, TSR Group distinguished itself from its competitors with investments made in the city economy and projects that create added value.

2020.title: Restructuring
2020.desc: TSR Group went through a restructuring process and continued its growth with the knowledge and strategic leadership of the board of directors.

corporatePage.leadershipTitle: Trust and Leadership in the Sector
corporatePage.leadershipDesc: TSR Group is one of the leading companies in the Turkish real estate sector with its dynamic structure, quality-oriented approach, and innovative vision. Aiming to raise sector standards thanks to its years of experience, the company continues on its way with the principles of reliability, transparency, and professionalism.
corporatePage.teamDesc: We offer you the best service with our experienced and professional team

aboutCompany.p1: TSR GROUP sells more than just real estate.
aboutCompany.p4: And we give customers what no one else does.

corporatePage.testimonialsDesc: Our customers' experiences and opinions are very valuable to us
corporatePage.contactDesc: Contact us, we are happy to answer your questions

realEstatePage.subtitle: Find your dream property with TSR GROUP. We are at your service with our wide portfolio, reliable service and professional consultants.
